title: flux Catalog
description: Top-level flux catalog file emitted by the DSL build.

extends.description: Upstream catalog identities this catalog refines. MUST include 'a2ui/basic@0.10' for Phase 1.

components.description: Map of component-name to compiled component definition (component.schema.json).

fallbacks.description: Map of flux-component-name to basic-catalog-component fallback.

functions.description: Optional additional client-side functions. Each must be a valid A2UI function definition. Phase 1 adds none.
